empowering people for a better future .

Paymoney links your money to the world, making life much better and exciting.

On the go transactions for any people, anywhere

Seamless payment gateway for people all around the world to handle their money transactions. Paymoney works for both registered & unregistered user.

Multiple Wallets

From Fiat to Cryptocurrencies, Paymoney enables users to transact with any currency accepted worldwide. Handle multiple currencies at the same time, in the same account using wallets.

Keep Your Money

Safe & Secured

Supporting both phone numbers & emails with state-of-the-art 2FA security measurements, Paymoney is here to make a difference.

worldwide accepted
payment methods

Ticket System

Tailored to improve your customer support and experience, our ticket system keeps balance within your business.

One Stop Payment Solution .

Packed with the latest and in demand features, Paymoney removes the hassle of money transfer and makes it much more enjoyable.

Merchants & Agents

Enable retailers & sellers to open online business accounts to accept payments from their customers.

Know Your Customers

KYC that Verifies the identity of any clients either before or during the time you start business with them.

User Disputes

Users can contact with merchant through dispute option if users have any claim about their products.

Roles & Permissions

System owners can add other users as admin providing permission to specific roles.

Revenues

Set to your preferred amount of fees & limits based on the type of currency or transaction to generate profit.

QR Codes

Set to your preferred amount of fees & limits based on the type of currency or transaction to generate profit.

Email & SMS

Dynamic email & sms templates to help keep your users acknowledged about their transactions.

User Control

Stay in control of your users with group based management system, user status and activity log.

Developer Sdk

With PayMoney Express merchant developer SDK, you can securely and effortlessly receive online payments from your customers.

Create Tickets

Ticket system is better way to dealing with customer about their issues where user can report or ask questions on various issues.

Paymoney Addons .

Paymoney is equipped with essential modules supporting wide range of international platforms used by millions of users to support your business growth.

CryptInvest - Wallet Growth Investment Addon

Investments that lets you make money after certain periods of time.

Learn More

AgentPay - PayMoney Agent Addon & Mobile App

Seamless cash in & cash out from your account to your customers.

Learn More

CryptExchange - Paymoney Crypto Swap and Buy/Sell Addon

Cryptocurrency exchange platform to swap crypto coins as well as buy and sell.

Learn More

Paymoney - OpenCart Addon

Enable Paymoney payment system for OpenCart store owners.

Learn More

PayMoney - WooCommerce Addon

Accept payments from your WordPress site to Paymoney through wallets.

Learn More

PayMoney - PerfexCrm Payment Addon

Accept payments from your Perfex CRM site through PayMoney wallets

Learn More

Custom Modules .

Money Transfer Service (Remittance)

Remittance is a transfer of funds to another bank account depending on currency. Also commonly known as international money transfers.

Learn More

Multilevel Referral System

A unique referral code is generated for each user on registration. Users only with a referral code will get referral awards.

Learn More

Escrow Module

The Escrow Module in Paymoney is designed to provide secure, trusted transactions by acting as a neutral third party that holds funds until all terms of a deal are met.

Learn More

Deposit and Payout via MobileMoney

It's a manual payment gateway where user can deposit as well as payout via their mobile network.

Learn More

Perfex Module

The Perfex Module in Paymoney is designed to streamline and manage the integration between the Paymoney platform and the Perfex CRM system.

Learn More

Shop Module

Similar to a multi vendor. A user can create his own store and can also buy another user’s store products.

Learn More

Express Merchant Rest API

Express merchant rest api end point provides an easy and convenient way for business users to integrate the payment process to any other platforms.

Learn More

Automated KYC Verification

The KYC system automates identity checks for compliance, verifying documents like ID cards and passports. It also uses facial recognition to match user data, simplifying onboarding.

Learn More

Event Ticket

Advertise your events & provide an easy way to buy tickets of your favorite concerts, sports games and theatre shows nationwide.

Learn More

Moodle Module

The Moodle Module in Paymoney is designed to enables educational institutions and e-learning platforms to facilitate seamless online payments for courses, subscriptions, and other educational services directly.

Learn More

Prestashop Module

The Prestashop Module of is designed to integrate Paymoney’s payment solutions with Prestashop, a popular e-commerce platform.

Learn More

Virtual Card

The Virtual Card module in Paymoney enables users to create and manage virtual cards with spending limits, ensuring secure online payments and enhanced privacy without exposing real card details.

Learn More

Payment via Payment Link

Payment link module enables a merchant to easily generate payment links & can get the payment from customers in an instant. Users can pay via their wallets.

Learn More

Payment Gateway

Deposit money to your Paymoney Wallet through most trusted, secure, robust and popular payment processors.

Learn More

Mobile Recharge

This module allows customers to easily top-up airtime and data at the world's leading operators & make payments using their wallets.

Learn More

Voucher Module

Voucher Module is designed to manage and process vouchers, which can be used as a form of payment or credit within the system.

Learn More
